title: Blue's Sword-Bedwars
description: This mod recreates Blue's abilities from Alan Becker's Bed Wars stickman animation. It can be used for combat in Bed Wars and Survival. Updated weekly.
body:
This mod recreates the counterattack sword abilities of Blue from Alan Becker's _Bed Wars_ stickman animation.This mod adds a throwable sword that automatically returns to you, making combat more dynamic and strategic.

![Throw the sword away](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eIFbTdLq/images/817a3d89dce4bcb3f95e7fbaa1fb780732319360_350.webp)
![I'm not afraid of this guy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/eIFbTdLq/images/c70605898bd7fcff0d3220961d31db8550523023_350.webp)

You can watch our [promotional videos.](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1qTVY69EiN/)

## Core Gameplay
- Hold any sword and right-click to throw it forward
- The sword automatically flies back to your hotbar after hitting an enemy
- If the hotbar is full, the sword goes into your inventory
- When hitting the ground, the sword sticks into the top of the block

## Special Mechanisms
- The sword cannot stick into obsidian, bedrock, or reinforced deepslate; it drops as an item instead
- If thrown within 2 blocks of a solid block, the sword returns directly without sticking
- Press P to open the pose editor; adjust the angle and position of the stuck sword freely

## Usage
Suitable for Bed Wars PvP and Survival mode combat, and compatible with multiplayer servers.

## Update
Updated on an irregular basis, but including bug fixes and performance improvements.Additionally, our version number may not match the file version number; the specific situation depends on the version number we publish.We'll try to improve it in the future.

## Commercial Use
Commercial licenses are available for small and medium servers. For inquiries, please contact me on Bilibili (username: Entyipaper).

## Other notes
“Fan-made mod, not affiliated with Alan Becker”
